/usr/bin/ar qc libmeshcore.a CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/src/frame_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/src/serial_port.c.o CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/src/proto_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/src/node_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/src/heartbeat.c.o "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/admin.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/apponly.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/atak.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/cannedmessages.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/channel.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/clientonly.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/config.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/connection_status.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/localonly.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/mesh.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/module_config.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/mqtt.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/paxcount.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/portnums.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/powermon.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/remote_hardware.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/rtttl.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/storeforward.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/telemetry.pb-c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/meshcore.dir/__/protobufs_protobuf-c/meshtastic/xmodem.pb-c.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libmeshcore.a
